results.title: Marco Rubio Throws RFK Jr. Under the Bus With Global Vaccine Push
results.description: Marco Rubio recently commented on RFK Jr and what steps they are set to take to tackle the Ebola outbreak. He also added that the United States will re-engage with the Gavi vaccine alliance. The Secretary of State’s remarks come after the Secretary of Health and Human Services previously addressed the growing Ebola situation. Marco [...] The post Marco Rubio Throws RFK Jr. Under the Bus With Global Vaccine Push appeared first on Mandatory .
